prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Energy Market Investigation (Electricity Transmission Losses) Order 2016, which is subject to review and amendments under UK legislation. Given its legislative implications that affect the energy sector, it applies to England as part of the UK legal framework.
